title.purpose: Contact name in a row, card title, dialog title.

body.purpose: All running text, chat bubbles, notes. Capped 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase section headers and kbd hints. 0.04em tracking.

wordmark.purpose: The brand mark. Lowercase, leading Brand Amber dot. Use <Wordmark/>.

mono.purpose: IDs, timings, asset counts, kbd content. Never decorative.

shadows.name: hairline-soft
shadows.purpose: Lighter ring on the composer well, chips, kbd.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover only, on genuinely interactive cards. Never at rest.

shadows.name: focus
shadows.purpose: Doubled focus ring on inputs and the composer.

motion.name: motion.expand
motion.purpose: Accordion row expand. ONLY sanctioned layout-property animation (height: auto).

motion.name: motion.pulse
motion.purpose: Recall flash after 'Jump to' / signature moments. accent-soft -> transparent. Never loops.

motion.name: motion.cursor
motion.purpose: Streaming cursor. opacity. Attached to trailing text segment.

motion.name: motion.pending
motion.purpose: Three pulsing dots beside the phase pill. opacity (0.3 -> 1 -> 0.3).

motion.name: focus-arrive
motion.purpose: Focus ring fade-in when arriving via tab.

rules: Icons inherit currentColor; never carry their own non-token color.
lucide-react only. Do not mix in Feather, Heroicons, Tabler, Phosphor, or custom SVGs.
Use the role-based size from sizesByContext, not a pixel-perfect choice.
The wordmark dot is a styled <span>, not an SVG. It's the one sanctioned non-lucide mark.

components.name: Wordmark (Header)
components.description: The Reknowable brand lockup. A Brand Amber dot + the lowercase mark in Geist Sans 500.
components.css: .ds-wordmark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-wordmark-dot { display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--color-accent, #CD9B5B); } .ds-wordmark-text { font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.022em; color: var(--color-fg, #F4F5F1); }

components.name: Recall Button (Composer Send)
components.description: Brand Amber filled. The single moment of the chat where recall lives: the send action.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-recall" type="submit" aria-label="Send"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 19V5"/><path d="M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-recall { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: var(--color-accent, #CD9B5B); color: var(--color-bg, #0D1729); border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-recall:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-recall:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-recall:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #CD9B5B); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filled-Ink Button
components.description: Cream-on-navy filled button. Used on Stop, Save, Undo, auth submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-ink { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; background: var(--color-fg, #F4F5F1); color: var(--color-bg, #0D1729); border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ink:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-ink:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ink:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, #CD9B5B); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Inline row action. Muted at rest; lifts to warm-graphite on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" type="button"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M17 3a2.828 2.828 0 1 1 4 4L7.5 20.5 2 22l1.5-5.5L17 3z"/></svg>Edit notes</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: transparent; color: var(--color-muted, #A5A29D); border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-surface-soft, #242324); color: var(--color-fg, #F4F5F1); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Inset hairline at rest; doubled Brand-Amber focus ring on focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-text" type="text" placeholder="Free-form notes about this contact." />
components.css: .ds-input-text { display: block; width: 100%; background: var(--color-surface, oklch(20% 0.045 260)); color: var(--color-fg, #F4F5F1); border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: -0.011em; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--color-border, oklch(28% 0.040 260)); transition: box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: var(--color-faint, oklch(50% 0.008 90)); } .ds-input-text:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-bg, #0D1729), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #CD9B5B); }

components.name: Meta Chip
components.description: Asset count, tag, kbd hint. Warm-graphite background, Mono font, no hover.
components.css: .ds-chip-meta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: var(--color-surface-soft, #242324); color: var(--color-muted, #A5A29D); border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: User Chat Bubble
components.description: Cream-filled right-justified bubble on navy. The bright moment in the conversation.
components.html: Add Anna Svensson, warmth 1, Göteborg, runs Stockholm AI meetups.
components.css: .ds-bubble-row { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-bubble-user { max-width: 88%; background: var(--color-fg, #F4F5F1); color: var(--color-bg, #0D1729); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; font-family: 'Geist Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: -0.011em; }

components.name: Warmth Dot
components.description: 9px circle filled with one ramp color. Anchors at Brand Amber and fades to navy slate.
components.css: .ds-warmth-row { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: center; padding: 0.5rem; } .ds-warmth-dot { display: inline-block; width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-warmth-1 { background: #CD9B5B; } .ds-warmth-2 { background: oklch(76% 0.12 50); } .ds-warmth-3 { background: oklch(80% 0.10 30); } .ds-warmth-4 { background: oklch(82% 0.08 350); } .ds-warmth-5 { background: oklch(70% 0.04 260); }

narrative.overview:
A CEO's evening office, lit by a single brass lamp. Navy walls. Cream pages on the desk. Amber-gold spine on the book that just opened. Not a server room, not an open-plan startup. Considered, late, focused. The mood of recalling who you know to make the morning's meeting work.

Reknowable is dark by design. The surface is deep navy, never cool blue-grey. The ink is warm cream, never pure white. The single accent is Brand Amber, taken straight from the Reknowable logo: it carries every recall moment.
keyCharacteristics: Dark by design, navy by surface, cream by ink, amber by accent.
All five palette values taken from the Reknowable logo.
Warmth ramp anchors at brand amber for closest and fades to a navy slate for most distant.
Two type families only: Geist Sans for everything, Geist Mono for IDs/timings.
Hairline 1px borders; surfaces lift via inset rings on hover, never drop shadow.
All motion ≤ 250ms, ease-out, transform + opacity only.
55/45 split panes above lg; tab-toggle stack below.
The wordmark [●] reknowable is the sacred identity mark.

rules.name: The Recall Rule
rules.body: Brand Amber appears only where the system marks a moment of recall: focus, the streaming cursor, AI-action confirmation, the wordmark mark, the highlight pulse, the signature first-entry, the composer send button. Decorative use breaks the rule.

rules.name: The Navy-and-Cream Rule
rules.body: Every surface is navy (cool, with hue ~260) or warm graphite. Every ink is cream or its derivatives. Pure black and pure white are banned. Cold blue-grey without hue is banned.

rules.name: The Logo-First Rule
rules.body: The five hex values from the Reknowable logo (#0D1729, #242324, #A5A29D, #CD9B5B, #F4F5F1) are sacred. They are the brand's color identity. New chromatic colors require an explicit case and update to this rule.

rules.name: The Warm-to-Cool Rule
rules.body: The warmth ramp's gradient is semantic and load-bearing. Warmth-1 = brand amber (closest); warmth-5 = navy slate (most distant).

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Geist Sans + Geist Mono are the entire typography vocabulary. Hierarchy from weight, scale, and case. Never from a serif/script accent.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Tech Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono appears only on inherently technical strings (timestamps, durations, IDs, key captions, asset counts, kbd content).

rules.name: The Wordmark Singular Rule
rules.body: The wordmark lockup is sacred. Use the <Wordmark/> component. Never uppercase, never boxed, never lose the dot.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: No element carries a drop shadow at rest. Lift is a response to state.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Surfaces describe themselves with a 1px hairline ring, not a fill change.

rules.name: The Layout-Properties Rule
rules.body: motion.expand (accordion height) is the only sanctioned layout-property animation. Everything else animates transform + opacity only.

rules.name: The Earned-Moments Rule
rules.body: Signature moments must be rare on purpose. New ones require a name, a once-per-lifetime trigger, and an explicit Brand-Amber expression.

dos: Do use Brand Amber only for recall moments: focus, the streaming cursor, AI-action confirmation, the wordmark mark, hover-selected states, signature first-entry, and the composer send button.
Do reach for a different type weight or scale before reaching for color or decoration.
Do keep neutrals tinted: navy surfaces carry hue 260 chroma 0.04, ink carries hue 110 chroma 0.008. Never pure #fff or #000.
Do use the inset hairline ring to describe surfaces. Cards are flat; they ring themselves.
Do keep all motion ≤ 250ms, ease-out, on transform + opacity only.
Do use Geist Mono only on inherently technical strings.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — non-essential animations become instant state changes.
Do keep body line length at 65–75ch where it wraps.
Do use the <Wordmark/> component for any in-product appearance of the brand mark.
Do add press feedback (active:scale-[0.96] or 0.98) on every interactive button.
donts: Don't add a second chromatic brand color. Reknowable runs on Brand Amber + the warmth ramp.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Every neutral tilts toward navy / cream. Cold zero-chroma blue-greys are banned.
Don't use AI slop in any form: purple-to-blue gradients, glassmorphism, neon on dark, sparkle decorations, 'AI-generated' patina.
Don't reach for any drop-shadow card lift. Surfaces are flat; hairlines describe them.
Don't build card grids of equal-sized rounded rectangles with icon-above-heading-above-text. SaaS template.
Don't reach for a modal when something fits inline. Command palette and cheatsheet are the only sanctioned modals.
Don't use bouncy, elastic, or spring-overshoot easings.
Don't animate layout properties. Transform + opacity only.
Don't use bright primary buttons for hierarchy.
Don't introduce a third type family.
Don't mix in icons from other families or write custom SVGs. lucide-react only.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
Don't re-style the wordmark inline. Use <Wordmark/>.
Don't drift toward 'ops dashboard' navy by adding cyan accents, neon glow, or terminal-green data displays.
